name: The Business Activity Monitoring Benchmark Report: The Eyes and Ears of BPM
description: Benchmark report surveying 160+ Global 5000 enterprises on Business Process Monitoring (BPM and BAM). Finds 94% of respondents moderately or very satisfied with IT results of BPM implementations; average ROI 18%, ROA 10%, revenue increase 9%, expense decrease 12%. Best in Class companies are 50% more likely than Industry Average to focus on competition as driver. 42% of companies are in planning stages. Median investment $101K-$500K. Real-time defined variably: 25% of BIC capture process state in under 10 seconds. Key challenge: management buy-in. Sponsored report (sponsors section left blank in draft). Peter Kastner is Research VP and Co-Founder. DRAFT dated 08-15-06.
